request.prompt: Create one classroom-safe educational image about Topic Introduction. Subject: Science (086). Grade level: Class X / 10. Topic focus: Acids, Bases and Salts. Must show visually: Acids and bases are two fundamental classes of chemicals with opposite properties. Acids taste sour and turn blue litmus red, while bases taste bitter/soapy and turn red litmus.... Visual goal: A labelled classroom diagram for Topic Introduction that makes the process or structure visible while the teacher explains topic_introduction.. Teaching context: Introduce the central idea and vocabulary.. Student takeaway: Understand the main concept and basic terms.. Show the scientific or educational concept itself, not a presentation slide about the concept. Do not draw a slide, visual panel, title banner, text box, classroom poster, infographic, worksheet, UI card, or presentation layout. Do not include any words,...
